card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.

card.flavor_text:
"We must rely on our own knowledge, not on the dogma of the seekers or the mutterings of the sphinxes."
—Tullus of Palandius

When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may draw a card.

This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.

card.name: Silver Myr
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {U}.

card.name: Darksteel Forge
card.oracle_text: Artifacts you control have indestructible. (Effects that say "destroy" don't destroy them. Artifact creatures with indestructible can't be destroyed by damage.)
card.flavor_text:
"Did it have this shape upon Mirrodin's creation, or did some inconceivable force shape the unshapable?"
—Pontifex, elder researcher

card.name: Anointed Procession
card.oracle_text: If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.
card.flavor_text:
"The gods here may walk among the people, but they are not with them."

card.oracle_text:
Tap target creature.
Metalcraft — If you control three or more artifacts, exile that creature.
card.flavor_text: Venser wondered if it could still be called a teleportation spell if the destination is oblivion.

card.name: Unwinding Clock

"The partisans have unearthed a strange artifact. None know its origin, but it gives them hope of a life beyond."
